$comment: Hand-authored gold dataset for evaluating claude-code-vault retrieval against the PoseVision project vault. Queries are realistic developer questions tied to specific notes/passages. Categories: keyword-only (literal identifier match), semantic-only (paraphrase without lexical overlap), vocabulary-gap (user word ≠ doc word), graph-context (needs cross-note traversal), multi-section (specific H2 in a multi-topic note), filter-scope (folder-narrowed). Never delete entries to make a metric look better — add new ones when notes change.
